basics.name: Anand Bhaskaran
basics.label: Senior Software Engineer | Technical Lead | Startup Mentor | MBA | AI
basics.summary: AI-focused software engineer with over 10 years of experience in designing scalable systems and leading high-performing teams. Delivered impactful features generating $1.5M+ in revenue and $337K in cost savings. Proven expertise in product-driven development, agile methodologies, and innovating AI solutions, ensuring high-quality engineering processes and customer-centric outcomes.

work.name: Beekeeper AG
work.summary: Technical Lead driving innovation in AI-powered features and scalable systems, ensuring robust platform reliability while mentoring engineering teams.
highlights: Led architectural design and launch of Employee Referral System (99.99% SLA) — generated $1.5M+ revenue including $500K ARR through agile methodologies and customer-focused iteration
Spearheaded development of Beekeeper's Templating Engine — reduced setup time by 90% and significantly enhanced user engagement, now powers 15% of all platform assets
Engineered robust search interface accommodating 10M+ users — substantially elevated user engagement and accelerated platform adoption rate
Assembled and led high-performing remote engineering teams to deliver maintainable code and customer-centric solutions
Collaborated in creating A/B experiments, deriving insightful data for product iterations, enhancing user satisfaction
Designed advanced Generative AI translation systems saving $337K and accelerating go-to-market since Jan 2024, increasing operational efficiency
Led cross-functional initiatives improving features like Seasonal Templates and Employee Lifecycle GTM, enhancing customer experience and functionality

work.name: Tenity
work.summary: Mentor and evaluator guiding startups on building scalable AI solutions and optimizing technical strategy for growth.
highlights: Conducted evaluations of emerging technologies, facilitating growth for seed-to-VC startups by aligning technical strategies with business goals
Advised startups on AI adoption and scalable solution development, enhancing their operational efficiency and market readiness

work.name: Dronistics
work.summary: Founding engineer for Dronistics, developing an autonomous drone delivery platform utilized in over 500 last-mile deliveries.
highlights: Delivered a complete software/cloud stack and infrastructure for an autonomous drone delivery system, successfully completing 500+ deliveries
Optimized real-time flight control APIs, reducing delivery times by 40% while maintaining a 99.5% safety record
Established enterprise partnerships by delivering scalable cloud infrastructure and DevOps pipelines

work.name: EPFL — Laboratory of Intelligent Systems (Robogen)
work.summary: Led the development of Robogen, an open-source platform for co-evolving robotic morphologies and control systems.
highlights: Spearheaded migration to AWS, featuring in the AWS Research Blog and enhancing computational capabilities for AI research
Supervised 20+ master's students at EPFL in robotics and AI projects, fostering the next generation of engineers
Contributed to impactful research in artificial evolution and robotics, leading to industry recognition and collaboration opportunities

education.institution: Quantic School of Business and Technology

publications.name: AI and creativity
publications.summary: Keynote presentation exploring the intersection of artificial intelligence and human creativity, demonstrating how AI can augment rather than replace creative processes in product development.

publications.name: From Infinite possibilites to finite Results
publications.publisher: AI for the rest of Us, UK (Talk)
publications.summary: Strategic framework presentation on transforming unlimited AI potential into measurable business outcomes through systematic implementation and practical constraint design.

publications.name: Microfrontends: Revolutionising Frontend Architecture
publications.summary: Technical deep-dive presentation demonstrating how microfrontend architecture enables scalable, team-autonomous development while reducing deployment complexity for enterprise applications.

awards.title: TI India Analog Design Contest Winner

Focused on explainable AI to enhance speed and clarity in financial analysis
Integrated technical and news-based insights for comprehensive market analysis

Focused on compliance-first design while ensuring product innovation and user-driven iteration
Achieved a 40% increase in user satisfaction through strategic partnerships and customer feedback loops
